innateAbility.name: Eelskin
innateAbility.description: Grants the Naga Siren bonus evasion.

abilities.name: Mirror Image
abilities.description: Creates multiple images of herself under Naga's control.

abilities.name: Ensnare
abilities.description: Interrupts the target and traps them in place, preventing movement or blinking.Can target invulnerable and sleeping units.

abilities.name: Reel In
abilities.description: The Siren channels and reels in all ensnared units to her within the radius without disabling them.

abilities.name: Rip Tide
abilities.description: After a number of attacks of the Siren and her images, they all collectively and simutaneously hit all nearby enemy units with a damaging wave of water that lowers armor for a duration.

abilities.name: Song of the Siren
abilities.description: All enemy units in range of the Naga are put into a magical stasis where they cannot act or be attacked, while allied units recover a percentage of their health per second.

abilities.name: Song of the Siren End
abilities.description: Releases all enemy units from Naga's stasis so they can be targeted again.
